overview: ZenReserve is a premium restaurant reservation management platform for both guests and staff. It features a guest-facing booking widget, a full admin dashboard with table plan management, CRM, analytics, and advanced settings — all in a warm, minimalist style inspired by Zenchef.
features: Premium drag-and-drop table plan with status rings
Smart table auto-assignment with best-fit logic
Dashboard KPIs with Couverts today split by service
Mini occupancy widget grouped by service timeslots
AI insight callout for overbooking risk
9 settings categories with dark/light mode toggle
